productDisplayName: Lee Men's Saddle Indigo Quarts T-shirt
description: CompositionIndigo blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a rugged stone wash look, ribbed neckline that has an in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Hailing from the cowboy land of Kansas, lee has doled out fantabulous jeans and casual wear for the rugged men. This indigo blue t-shirt from lee celebrates the clothing range for the Shawnee Mission group of counties, while the stone wash look adds to the rough living style of the cowboy on the ranch. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
